title: ITALY enforcement action against S.M. Trattamento Acqua di XX (30,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 30,000 on S.M. Trattamento Acqua di XY. The controller had been active in direct marketing, using automated calls for this purpose. However, the controller failed to base the data processing on an adequate legal basis and failed to implement appropriate...
